sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90365" key="prosxeima/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσχειμάζω</orth>, <sense id="n90365.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">winter</tr_>, of an army, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐν . . </quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:4:6:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.6.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
